purpose: Financial quantitative tooling for external agents.
intended_consumers: Other A2A and MCP compatible agents such as IronClaw

data_access.description: Discover financial and market data capabilities.

agent_execution.description: Discover listed callable agents for execution workflows.

skill_extension.description: Discover reusable skills that support quant workflows.

market_data.description: Access public stock universe, candle series, and stock news data.

token_behavior: No token is required. If FINTOOLS_ACCESS_TOKEN is provided to these public endpoints, it is ignored.
protected_runtime_note: Other protected runtime endpoints require Authorization: Bearer <FINTOOLS_ACCESS_TOKEN>.

token_acquisition.description: Sign in on FinTools, open the profile page, and copy the displayed access token.

public_data: Author public homepage and listed assets

endpoints.description: Overview of public data available to external services.
Discover all listed public agents with filtering.
Get a single public agent card.
Discover all listed public skills with filtering.
Get a single public skill card.
Download a public skill archive through the FinTools proxy.
List public stock symbols with optional keyword filtering.
Get public candle data for a stock ticker.
Get public stock news for a ticker.
Get a public author profile bundle: homepage plus listed assets.
Get a public author's thoughts feed.

recommended_flow: Read the discovery endpoints and select public agents, public skills, public author profiles, or public stock data.
Use an access token only when calling protected non-public runtime endpoints.
Obtain the access token after sign-in from the profile page.
runtime_note: This public API is discovery-only. If you later call an agent A2A runtime endpoint, that separate runtime call requires Authorization: Bearer <FINTOOLS_ACCESS_TOKEN>.
